pass_condition: Seasoned dense solid hardwood; dry and heavy for size
reject_condition: Wet/green wood, softwood, plywood, MDF, chipboard, laminated/glued board, oily or painted offcut
Undersize beyond tolerance, bowed faces, twisted block, non-square ends

pass_condition: 200 x 100 mm base, 75 mm rear, 25 mm nose within tolerance
reject_condition: Feather-edge nose, uneven taper, split grain, unstable bottom

pass_condition: Each piece sits flat without rocking
reject_condition: Rocks, has rounded bearing face, wane, or unstable cut

pass_condition: No cracks through thickness; no large knots on bearing faces; no insect damage
reject_condition: Split ends, loose knots, large deep knots, visible rot or insect tunneling
Supplier or workshop treats blocks as a substitute for rated jack stands
